description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a geometric, boxy design and large glass windows dominating the facade. The structure features two main levels, with a rooftop terrace enclosed by glass railings and an exterior staircase leading up to it. The house is surrounded by a paved patio area, which includes a rectangular swimming pool and a shaded poolside lounge. Several trees and shrubs are placed around the property, adding greenery to the urban setting. The exterior is finished in dark materials, contrasting with the light blue of the pool and glass elements. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, boxy house with large glass windows, a rooftop terrace, and a poolside patio, surrounded by trees and paved areas.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main facade with expansive glass windows, the rooftop terrace, and the pool area to the right.
description_view_1: From this angle, the exterior staircase to the rooftop terrace and the rear patio area are visible, along with landscaping elements.
description_view_2: The front of the house is shown with the main entrance, large windows, the pool, and a shaded lounge area.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the back of the house, showing the pool, rear windows, and surrounding trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with wide glass doors, minimal steps, and no porch, emphasizing a clean, open look
